purpose: Define how future brain memories declare, reuse, and validate required runtime context fields.
rules: Every active runtime memory must declare required_context_fields.
Every required field must be in context_field_registry_v1_0.json.
Every active memory's required fields must be supported by an active context builder.
Future new fields require registry patch before memory activation.
The mobile panel must never silently treat missing fields as memory not active; it must show MEMORY_INPUT_INSUFFICIENT.
